title: Pandora Station
description: A music or podcast station in Pandora, serving as a personalized radio channel.

stationDescription.description: Description of the station content and format

artUrl.description: URL for the station artwork image

isShared.description: Whether this station is publicly shared by the creator

allowDelete.description: Whether the current user can delete this station

allowRename.description: Whether the current user can rename this station

isGenre.description: Whether this is a curated Pandora genre station
